phrases.cultural_note: O acesso ao claustro exige subir a escadaria nobre do convento.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Claustro Renascentista.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo reh-nuh-sayng-TEESH-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Renaissance Cloister.

phrases.cultural_note: The Renaissance cloister is a key architectural feature of the former Convent of Madre de Deus, now part of the museum.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Painel de Lisboa?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Painel de Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW peye-NEHL DIH leezh-BOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: A peça é a maior representação azulejar de uma cidade portuguesa.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um monitor de sala.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR DIH SAH-luh.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR DIH SAH-luh.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um monitor de sala.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH LAW-zhuh DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh?

likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the main ticket desk.

responses.english: Ask at the main ticket desk.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Painel de Lisboa?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Painel de Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW peye-NEHL DIH leezh-BOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The Painel de Lisboa is a large 18th-century tile panel depicting Lisbon before the 1755 earthquake, a highlight of the collection.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira ou a um monitor de sala.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira principal para alugar um audioguia.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL PUH-ruh uh-loo-GAHR OONNG ow-deeoo-GEEUH.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I rent the audio guide?
phrases.cultural_note: A equipa da bilheteira ativa os dispositivos imediatamente após a compra.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the main ticket desk.

responses.english: Good morning, at the main ticket desk.

phrases.text_local: Onde está a loja de cerâmica?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee is-TA a LO-zhah dji se-RA-mee-kah (link 'a' to 'LO')
phrases.cultural_note: A loja comercializa réplicas autorizadas e peças de artesãos locais.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à saída do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the museum exit.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the main ticket office?
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde fica a bilheteira principal?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The ticket office is near the entrance for efficiency.

likely_response.translation_en: At the entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Em que piso fica o guarda-volumes?
phrases.pronunciation: AYNG KIH PEE-zoo FEE-kuh AW GWAH-ruh-duh-voo-LOO-mihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: O serviço é gratuito e operado por funcionários uniformizados.

likely_response.translation_en: Go to the main ticket office.

responses.english: Go to the main ticket office.

phrases.cultural_note: Museus portugueses costumam manter o serviço junto aos controlos de segurança.

phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra o Painel de Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AW peye-NEHL DIH leezh-BOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: A obra monumental ocupa uma parede inteira dedicada ao período pombalino.
